calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Executor
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Lillian Hyatt.

Mr. Conrad stated that they had no luck finding information on John Roberts, that they did an internet search and that both law firms are long gone. The Court granted the Ex Parte Petition to Dispense with Notice to John Roberts (order signed in open Court). The Court stated that it is not inclined to name a Successor Executor. Mr. Conrad stated that the three Beneficiaries called him to say "Thank you for doing this.", that there are a couple of small accounts at Bank of America (about $150,000.00), that there are three annuities with some complexities (about/up to $750,000.00) and that there is no real property. The Court grants the Petition for Appointment of Successor as to the Trust and denies the petition as to the will (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Executor
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Continued To Jan-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
